headline: Despite Lowering Price Target, TD Cowen Sees Upside in Capital One Financial (COF) Stock
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the 10 Best Affordable Growth Stocks to Buy for the Next 5 Years. As part of its broader Q1 update for the consumer finance sector, TD Cowen cut its price target on Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) from $290 to $260 while keeping a Buy rating on […]

headline: What to Expect From Capital One’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Capital One Financial is set to report its first-quarter earnings this month, and analysts are expecting double-digit growth in its earnings.
